---
title: "fingerprints"
output: pdf_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

## R Markdown

This is an R Markdown document. Markdown is a simple formatting syntax for authoring HTML, PDF, and MS Word documents. For more details on using R Markdown see <http://rmarkdown.rstudio.com>.

When you click the **Knit** button a document will be generated that includes both content as well as the output of any embedded R code chunks within the document. You can embed an R code chunk like this:

```{r cars}
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)

interpret = function(cond, template_id, event_match_id) {
  
    # if we didn't get one of the easy mappings
    if (cond == 'sameEv-sameSchema') {
       return('correct-path')
    } else if (cond == 'otherEv-sameSchema') {
      return('other-path-from-same-schema')
    }
    # then do the conditionals
    # if event2 is used as template, then:
    # - during event2 TRs the same-event/other-schema condition is the visually-matched-path and the other-event/other-schema condition is the unrelated-path.
    # - during event3 TRs the other-event/other-schema condition is the visually-matched-path and the same-event/other-schema condition is the unrelated-path.
    # - during event4 TRs the same-event/other-schema condition is the visually-matched-path and the other-event/other-schema condition is the unrelated-path.
    if (template_id == 2) {
        if (event_match_id == 2) {
            if (cond == 'sameEv-otherSchema') {
                return('visually-matched-path')
            }
            else if (cond == 'otherEv-otherSchema') {
                return('unrelated-path')
            }
        } else if (event_match_id == 3) {
            if (cond == 'sameEv-otherSchema') {
               return('unrelated-path')
            }
            else if (cond == 'otherEv-otherSchema') {
              return('visually-matched-path')
            }
                
        } else if (event_match_id == 4) {
            if (cond == 'sameEv-otherSchema') {
              return('visually-matched-path')
            }
            else if(cond == 'otherEv-otherSchema') {
              return('unrelated-path')
            }
        } else {
          print("Error: event_match_id invalid",event_match_id )
        }
    }
    # if event3 is used as template, then:
    # - during event2 TRs the other-event/other-schema condition is the visually-matched-path and the same-event/other-schema condition is the unrelated-path.
    # - during event3 TRs the same-event/other-schema condition is the visually-matched-path and the other-event/other-schema condition is the unrelated-path.
    # - during event4 TRs the other-event/other-schema condition is the visually-matched-path and the same-event/other-schema condition is the unrelated-path.
    else if (template_id == 3) {
        if (event_match_id == 2) {
            if (cond == 'sameEv-otherSchema') {
              return('unrelated-path')
            } else if (cond == 'otherEv-otherSchema') {
              return('visually-matched-path')
            }
        } else if (event_match_id == 3) {
            if (cond == 'sameEv-otherSchema') {
              return('visually-matched-path')
            } else if (cond == 'otherEv-otherSchema') {
              return('unrelated-path')
            }
        } else if (event_match_id == 4) {
            if (cond == 'sameEv-otherSchema') {
               return('unrelated-path')
            } else if (cond == 'otherEv-otherSchema') {
              return('visually-matched-path')
            }
        } else {
           print("Error: event_match_id invalid",event_match_id)
        }
    }
    # if event4 is used as template, then:
    # - during event2 TRs the same-event/other-schema condition is the visually-matched-path and the other-event/other-schema condition is the unrelated-path.
    # - during event3 TRs the other-event/other-schema condition is the visually-matched-path and the same-event/other-schema condition is the unrelated-path.
    # - during event4 TRs the same-event/other-schema condition is the visually-matched-path and the other-event/other-schema condition is the unrelated-path.
    else if (template_id == 4) {
        if (event_match_id == 2) {
            if (cond == 'sameEv-otherSchema') {
              return('visually-matched-path')
            } else if (cond == 'otherEv-otherSchema') {
              return('unrelated-path')
            }
        } else if (event_match_id == 3) {
           if (cond == 'sameEv-otherSchema') {
             return('unrelated-path')
           }
            else if (cond == 'otherEv-otherSchema') {
              return('visually-matched-path')
            }
        }
        else if (event_match_id == 4) {
            if (cond == 'sameEv-otherSchema') {
              return('visually-matched-path')
            }
            else if (cond == 'otherEv-otherSchema') {
                return('unrelated-path')  
            }
        } else {
          print("Error: event_match_id invalid",event_match_id )
        }
    } else {
        print("Error: template_id invalid")
    }
}
    
                    
```


```{r}

interpret2 = function(cond) {
    if (cond == 'sameEv-sameSchema') {
       return('path1')
    } else if (cond == 'otherEv-sameSchema') {
      return('path2') 
    } else if (cond == 'sameEv-otherSchema') {
      return('path3')
    } else if (cond == 'otherEv-otherSchema') {
      return('path4')
    }
  
}

 #interpret(path_id, 
#                                    raw_df$event_template_id[index], 
#                                    raw_df$event_matching_id[index]))
get_new_path_ids = function(raw_df) {
  index = 0
  new_list = c()
  for (path_id in raw_df$path_id) {
    index = index + 1
    new_list = c(new_list, interpret(path_id, 
                                 raw_df$event_template_id[index], 
                                   raw_df$event_matching_id[index]))
                 
                 #interpret2(path_id))
  }
  return(new_list)
}

get_new_matching_ids = function(raw_df) {
  new_list = c()
  for (match in raw_df$event_matching_id) {
    if (match == 2) {
      new_list = c(new_list,"campfire/flower")
    } else if (match == 3) {
      new_list = c(new_list,"coin/torch")
    } else if (match == 4) {
      new_list = c(new_list,"egg/painting")
    } else {
      new_list = c(new_list,"other")
    }
  }
  return(new_list)
}



get_sem_bounds = function(raw_df) {
  index = 0
  new_lb_list = c()
  new_ub_list = c()
  for (mean in raw_df$corr) {
    index = index + 1
    lb = raw_df$lower_bound[index]
    sem = (lb - mean) / (-1 * 0.05)
    new_lb_list = c(new_lb_list, mean - (5*sem))
    new_ub_list = c(new_ub_list, mean + (5*sem))
  }
  raw_df$lower_bound = new_lb_list
  raw_df$upper_bound = new_ub_list
  return(raw_df)
}

```

```{r}
plot_raw_fingerprint_cluster = function(raw_df, cluster_id, event_template_id, n_clusters) {
   corr_list = raw_df$corr
   lower_bound_list = raw_df$lower_bound
   upper_bound_list = raw_df$upper_bound
    if (event_template_id == 2) {
      template_tag = "campfire/flower"
    } else if (event_template_id == 3) {
      template_tag = "coin/torch"
    } else if (event_template_id == 4) {
      template_tag = "egg/painting"
    } 
    ggplot(raw_df, aes(tr,corr)) +  
        geom_line(aes(color = path_id, group = path_id)) +
        geom_ribbon(alpha = 0.2, aes(x = tr, ymin = lower_bound, ymax = upper_bound, group = path_id, fill = path_id)) +
        facet_grid(. ~ event_matching_id) +
        xlab("TR") +
        ylab("Neural Similarity with Template (correlation)") +
        ggtitle(paste( #"K = ", 
                 # as.character(n_clusters),
                 # " & Cluster ", as.character(cluster_id), 
                   "Event Template: ", 
                  as.character(template_tag), sep = ""))
}    
```

```{r}
get_raw_df_path = function(n_clusters_in, cluster_id_in, event_template_id_in, distill_it, exaggerated_0, weight_it, cap_zero, threshold, by_sil, power_weight) {
  if (distill_it == FALSE) {
    path = paste("/scratch/gpfs/rk1593/clustering_output/kmeans_fingerprints_tval/kmeans_", as.character(n_clusters_in), "clusters_tval.csv", sep = "")
  } else {
    path = paste("/scratch/gpfs/rk1593/clustering_output/kmeans_fingerprints_tval/kmeans_",  as.character(n_clusters_in), "clusters_tval", sep = "")
    if (by_sil) {
      path = paste(path, "_by_silhouttes", sep = "")
      
    } else {
      if (exaggerated_0) {
        path = paste(path, "_Consider0_T", as.character(threshold), sep = "")
      } else {
        path = paste(path, "_NoConsider0", sep = "")
      }
      
      if (weight_it) {
        path = paste(path, "_WeightByMean", sep = "")
      } else {
        path = paste(path, "_NoWeightByMean", sep = "")
      }
         
      if (cap_zero) {
        path = paste(path, "_CapZero", sep = "")
      } else {
        path = paste(path, "_NoCapZero", sep = "")
      }
    }
   
    path = paste(path, "_", as.character(distill_numLights), "distill_numLights.csv", sep = "")
    
  }
  print(path)
  return(path)
}
```


```{r pressure, echo=FALSE}
n_clusters_in = 5
cluster_id_in = 1
exaggerated_0 = FALSE
weight_it = TRUE
cap_zero = FALSE
distill_it = FALSE
distill_numLights = 10000
threshold = 0.5
by_sil = FALSE
power_weight = 1

event_template_id_in = 2
print(get_raw_df_path(n_clusters_in, cluster_id_in,
                                  event_template_id_in, distill_it,
                                  exaggerated_0, weight_it, cap_zero, 
                                  threshold, by_sil, power_weight))
raw_df = read.csv(get_raw_df_path(n_clusters_in, cluster_id_in,
                                  event_template_id_in, distill_it,
                                  exaggerated_0, weight_it, cap_zero, 
                                  threshold, by_sil, power_weight))
raw_df = filter(raw_df, cluster_id == cluster_id_in, 
                         event_template_id == event_template_id_in,
                         event_matching_id == 2 | event_matching_id == 3 | event_matching_id == 4)
raw_df$event_matching_id = get_new_matching_ids(raw_df)
plot_raw_fingerprint_cluster(raw_df, cluster_id_in, event_template_id_in, n_clusters_in)

event_template_id_in = 3
raw_df = read.csv(get_raw_df_path(n_clusters_in, cluster_id_in, event_template_id_in, distill_it, exaggerated_0, weight_it, cap_zero, threshold, by_sil, power_weight))
raw_df = filter(raw_df, cluster_id == cluster_id_in, 
                         event_template_id == event_template_id_in,
                         event_matching_id == 2 | event_matching_id == 3 | event_matching_id == 4)
raw_df$event_matching_id = get_new_matching_ids(raw_df)
plot_raw_fingerprint_cluster(raw_df, cluster_id_in, event_template_id_in, n_clusters_in)

event_template_id_in = 4
raw_df = read.csv(get_raw_df_path(n_clusters_in, cluster_id_in, event_template_id_in, distill_it, exaggerated_0, weight_it, cap_zero, threshold, by_sil, power_weight))
raw_df = filter(raw_df, cluster_id == cluster_id_in, 
                         event_template_id == event_template_id_in,
                         event_matching_id == 2 | event_matching_id == 3 | event_matching_id == 4)
raw_df$event_matching_id = get_new_matching_ids(raw_df)
plot_raw_fingerprint_cluster(raw_df, cluster_id_in, event_template_id_in, n_clusters_in)
```


```{r pressure, echo=FALSE}
n_clusters_in = 5
cluster_id_in = 1


event_template_id_in = 2
raw_df = read.csv(paste("/scratch/gpfs/rk1593/clustering_output/kmeans_fingerprints_tval/kmeans_", as.character(n_clusters_in), "clusters_tval2.csv", sep = ""))
raw_df = filter(raw_df, cluster_id == cluster_id_in, 
                         event_template_id == event_template_id_in,
                       event_matching_id == 0 | event_matching_id == 1 | event_matching_id == 5)
#raw_df$path_id = get_new_path_ids(raw_df)
#raw_df = get_sem_bounds(raw_df)
plot_raw_fingerprint_cluster(raw_df, cluster_id_in, event_template_id_in, n_clusters_in)

event_template_id_in = 3
raw_df = read.csv(paste("/scratch/gpfs/rk1593/clustering_output/kmeans_fingerprints_tval/kmeans_", as.character(n_clusters_in), "clusters_tval2.csv", sep = ""))
raw_df = filter(raw_df, cluster_id == cluster_id_in, 
                         event_template_id == event_template_id_in,
                         event_matching_id == 0 | event_matching_id == 1 | event_matching_id == 5)
#raw_df$path_id = get_new_path_ids(raw_df)
#raw_df = get_sem_bounds(raw_df)
plot_raw_fingerprint_cluster(raw_df, cluster_id_in, event_template_id_in, n_clusters_in)

event_template_id_in = 4
raw_df = read.csv(paste("/scratch/gpfs/rk1593/clustering_output/kmeans_fingerprints_tval/kmeans_", as.character(n_clusters_in), "clusters_tval2.csv", sep = ""))
raw_df = filter(raw_df, cluster_id == cluster_id_in, 
                         event_template_id == event_template_id_in,
                       event_matching_id == 0 | event_matching_id == 1 | event_matching_id == 5)
#raw_df$path_id = get_new_path_ids(raw_df)
#raw_df = get_sem_bounds(raw_df)
plot_raw_fingerprint_cluster(raw_df, cluster_id_in, event_template_id_in, n_clusters_in)


#raw_df = read.csv(paste("/scratch/gpfs/rk1593/clustering_output/kmeans_fingerprints_tval/kmeans_", as.character(n_clusters_in), "clusters_tval.csv", sep = ""))
#raw_df = filter(raw_df, cluster_id == cluster_id_in, 
#                         event_template_id == event_template_id_in,
#                         event_matching_id == 2 | event_matching_id == 3 | event_matching_id == 4)
#raw_df$path_id = get_new_path_ids(raw_df)
#raw_df = get_sem_bounds(raw_df)
#plot_raw_fingerprint_cluster(raw_df, cluster_id_in, event_template_id_in, n_clusters_in)
```



```{r pressure, echo=FALSE}
alpha = 0.1
n_clusters_in = 7

event_template_id_in = 4
cluster_id_in = 3


raw_df = read.csv(paste("/scratch/gpfs/rk1593/clustering_output/kmodes_fingerprints_alpha", as.character(alpha),
                        "/kmodes_", as.character(n_clusters_in), "clusters_alpha", as.character(alpha),".csv", sep = ""))
raw_df = filter(raw_df, cluster_id == cluster_id_in, 
                         event_template_id == event_template_id_in,
                         event_matching_id == 2 | event_matching_id == 3 | event_matching_id == 4)
#raw_df$path_id = get_new_path_ids(raw_df)
#raw_df = get_sem_bounds(raw_df)
plot_raw_fingerprint_cluster(raw_df, cluster_id_in, event_template_id_in, n_clusters_in)
```

Note that the `echo = FALSE` parameter was added to the code chunk to prevent printing of the R code that generated the plot.
```{r}

change_raw_df_path_id = function(raw_df) {
  for index,row in raw_df.iterrows():
        raw_df.loc[index,"path_id"] =  interpret(raw_df.loc[index,"path_id"], raw_df.loc[index,"event_template_id"], raw_df.loc[index,"event_matching_id"])
}


```
